Name: test_report_items_have_required_keys
Description: Every report item must contain all four required top-level keys.

Name: test_comparison_runs_without_error
Description: Smoke test: comparison must complete without raising any exception.

Name: test_iac_array_longer_than_cloud
Description: Extra IaC elements must appear with CloudValue=None.

Name: test_array_length_difference_cloud_longer
Description: Extra cloud elements must appear with IacValue=None.

Name: test_changelog_entries_use_spec_field_names
Description:
ChangeLog entries must use the spec field names:
            KeyName / CloudValue / IacValue
        and must NOT contain the old snake_case names:
            field / cloud_value / iac_value

Name: test_mixed_nested_objects_and_arrays
Description: Complex mixed structures produce combined dot + bracket notation keys.

Name: test_nested_array_inside_array
Description: Arrays nested inside arrays must use chained bracket notation key[i][j].

Name: test_match_resources_have_empty_changelog
Description: Resources with State=Match must have an empty ChangeLog.

Name: test_identical_arrays_produce_no_changelog
Description: Identical arrays must result in State=Match with an empty ChangeLog.

Name: test_nested_objects_inside_array
Description: Fields inside objects that are array elements use key[i].field notation.

Name: test_all_cloud_resources_are_analyzed
Description: Every cloud resource must produce exactly one result entry.

Name: test_modified_resources_have_changelog
Description: Resources with State=Modified must have at least one ChangeLog entry.

Name: test_state_values_are_valid
Description: Every result State must be one of: Match | Modified | Missing.

Name: test_generate_persistent_report
Description:
Write the final comparison report to reports/ for human inspection.
        This is the report that CI/CD uploads as a build artifact.

Name: test_array_element_difference_detected
Description: A differing array element must produce a bracket-notation changelog entry.

Name: test_report_is_generated
Description: Report file must exist and be a flat JSON array (spec requirement).

Name: test_missing_resources_have_no_iac_item
Description: Resources with State=Missing must have IacResourceItem=None.
